DashboardPage.gettingStartedDescription: Start by exploring volunteer roles, browsing shifts, and finding where you fit in the community. Community is built on shared effort—everyone contributes a little to create something bigger together. By showing up, you help shape a more vibrant, connected experience for everyone.
DashboardPage.tipsDescription: Make sure to check in before your shift! Plan to arrive 15-20 minutes early to sign in and meet your department lead.
DashboardPage.exploreTeamsDescription: Discover where your interests and skills fit within the community.
DashboardPage.findShift: Find a shift that works for you
DashboardPage.findShiftDescription: Look through available shifts and roles to see how you can contribute.
DashboardPage.signUpDescription: Sign up for at least one shift and review any details. Visit your shifts page to manage and see your upcoming shift(s).
DashboardPage.showUpDescription: Meet others and support your team! Your participation helps build a stronger, more vibrant community for everyone.

SignInPage.title: Sign in
SignInPage.signInToAccount: Sign in to your account to continue.
SignInPage.useOAuth: We use {provider} to provide a single sign-on experience.
SignInPage.clickButtonToRedirect: Clicking the button below will redirect you to the {provider} login page.
SignInPage.afterLoggingIn: After logging in, you will be redirected back to this application.
SignInPage.forgotDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
SignInPage.forgotSuccessMessage: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a reset link. Check your inbox.
SignInPage.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
SignInPage.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed sign-in attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.
SignInPage.rateLimitError: Too many requests from your connection. Please try again later.

SignUpPage.title: Create account
SignUpPage.description: Enter your details to create an account.
SignUpPage.nameDescription: Please use your full legal name. This will not be shared with anyone except team leads, and will only be used in emergencies.
SignUpPage.chosenNameDescription: This is the name that will be displayed to other volunteers. It can be your real name, a nickname, or anything you choose.
SignUpPage.emailDescription: Your email will only be shared with team leads, and will be used to communicate important information.
SignUpPage.passwordDescription: Your password must be at least 8 characters long and include both letters and numbers.
SignUpPage.signInLink: Already have an account? Sign in
SignUpPage.errorName_too_long: Name must be 255 characters or less.
SignUpPage.errorEmail_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
SignUpPage.errorPassword_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
SignUpPage.errorPassword_too_weak: Password must include both letters and numbers.
SignUpPage.errorAccount_exists: An account with this email already exists. Sign in or reset your password.
SignUpPage.rateLimitError: Too many attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.

ForgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot password
ForgotPasswordPage.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
ForgotPasswordPage.successMessage: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a reset link. Check your inbox.
ForgotPasswordPage.rateLimitError: Too many requests. Please try again in 15 minutes.

ResetPasswordPage.title: Reset password
ResetPasswordPage.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
ResetPasswordPage.missingToken: Missing reset token. Please use the link from your email.
ResetPasswordPage.rateLimitError: Too many attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.

EventShiftsPage.title: Shifts
EventShiftsPage.emailFailureMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

MyShiftsPage.title: My Shifts
MyShiftsPage.emailSuccessMessage: We've sent an email with your upcoming shifts. Check your inbox soon!
MyShiftsPage.emailFailureMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

UsersDashboardPage.title: All Volunteers
UsersDashboardPage.confirmDeleteText: Are you sure you want to delete "{userName}"? The record will be permanently deleted after 30 days.

errors.eventIdRequiredForOrganiser: Event ID is required for organiser role
errors.eventIdRequiredForTeamLead: Event ID is required for team-lead role
errors.teamIdRequiredForTeamLead: Team ID is required for team-lead role

ResetPasswordEmail.subject: Reset your password
ResetPasswordEmail.text: Click the link to reset your password: {url}

ShiftEmail.subject: Your {eventName} shifts
ShiftEmail.thanks: Thanks for signing up to volunteer with {eventName} - we are excited to see you, and definitely can't make all the magic happen without your help.
ShiftEmail.yourShifts: Here are the shifts you have signed up for:
ShiftEmail.closing: Thanks again and can’t wait to see you at {eventName}!

MenuCard.confirmText: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"?

UserForm.duplicateAdminRole: This user already has an admin role
UserForm.duplicateOrganiserRole: This user already has an organiser role for this event
UserForm.duplicateTeamLeadRole: This user already has a team lead role for this event and team
UserForm.eventRequired: Event is required for organiser role
UserForm.eventAndTeamRequired: Event and team are required for team lead role
UserForm.cannotRemoveOwnAdminRole: You cannot remove your own admin role

TeamForm.teamNameDescription: This will be the team's official title
TeamForm.teamSlugDescription: This will be used for the team's URL. It must be unique among teams in the same event, and can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
TeamForm.teamDescriptionDescription: Provide a description about the team
TeamForm.teamLeadDescription: Select the lead for this team.
TeamForm.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the team "{teamName}"? This will delete all shifts associated with the team and remove all volunteers from those shifts. This action cannot be undone.

NavBar.screenReaderDialogDescription: Navigation menu with links to different sections of the application

Metadata.description: A system to support the organisation of alternative arts events

ShiftDialog.deleteShiftConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this shift? This action cannot be undone.
ShiftDialog.title: Title of Shift
ShiftDialog.lengthDescription: Length of the shift in HOURS
ShiftDialog.requirementsDescription: Qualifications that volunteers must have to sign up for this shift. Optional.

QualificationList.none: No qualifications yet. To gain qualifications, reach out to your event organiser or team lead.

QualificationDetails.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the qualification "{qualificationName}"? This will remove the qualification from all volunteers and shifts. This action cannot be undone.

QualificationDialog.name: Name
QualificationDialog.nameDescription: Please include the relevant event and year for the requirement, This way we can tell the difference between each year's Ranger Training's, etc.
QualificationDialog.teamDescription: The team associated with this qualification. Optional.
QualificationDialog.errorMessageDescription: The error someone will see when attempting to sign up for a shift without this requirement.

SendEmailButton.notifyAllDescription: This will send an email to {numEmails} volunteers in {emailContext}.
SendEmailButton.includeShifts: Include shift details in the email
SendEmailButton.send: Send {numEmails, plural, one {# email} other {# emails}}
